extract: Swampert (Japanese: ラグラージ Laglarge) is a dual-type Water/Ground Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Marshtomp starting at level 36. It is the final form of Mudkip. Swampert can Mega Evolve into Mega Swampert using the Swampertite. Mega Swampert was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.
